ItacWorkItem.ShortTitle: Difesa de gli illustri Signori, Nicolo`, Tristano, e Federico Savorgnani,
ItacWorkItem.LongTitle: dalle false imputationi date loro, et all`honorata sua famiglia, dal Signor Martio Colloredo
ItacWorkItem.Notes: On the title page: `Deffense des seigneurs...`. On page 1: `Ex Bibliotheca Lus[tre?]vina`. Manuscript text in British Library, Add. MS 8596. The colophon image corresponds to the f. Aii, where the Academy is mentioned.
ItacWorkItem.Citation: Lorenza Gianfrancesco and Simone Testa, directed by Jane Everson, Denis Reidy, Lisa Sampson, assisted by Thomas Denman, for the Italian Academies Database project.
